top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh Sworn in as New Federal Reserve Chair
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh was sworn in as the 17th chair of the federal reserve in a ceremony at the White House Friday. Speaking after taking his oath, Warsh called it the 'honor of a lifetime' to re-enter public service and promised that he will lead a 'reform-oriented' Fed.  Despite fears around Fed independence, President Trump told Warsh to 'just do your own thing and do a great job.' (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves statement to Parliament
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has today (21 May) updated the House of Commons on the Government's economic response to the war in Iran, and the action they are taking to support families and businesses with the Cost of Living.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
